creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:

> [...]
> -MAINTAINER=    dr@domix.de
> +MAINTAINER=    jdunn@aquezada.com

Do you have a permission from the old maintainer for that?

Related question: have you contacted maintainer for approval for this update?

-Maxim
